title: viola × cluniensis
intro: Viola × cluniensis, also known as the hybrid pansy or garden pansy, is a plant that results from the cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola sororia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Viola × cluniensis include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote relaxation and digestive health.
